name: haunt-api
description: Hosted MCP server for structured web extraction. Pass a URL and prompt, get clean JSON.

tools.name: web_extract
tools.description: Extract structured data from any URL. Provide a URL and a plain-English description of what you want extracted.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Check your current API usage and remaining credits.

auth.description: Pass your API key as the 'api_key' tool argument. Get one at https://hauntapi.com/#signup
